moments.title: World Cup Final Weekend
moments.blurb: The biggest game in football, the FIFA World Cup 2026 final, kicks off tomorrow, July 19, in MetLife Stadium, New Jersey, USA.

angles.name: Final buzz
angles.copy: Who are you backing for glory in the World Cup Final tomorrow? The ultimate football showdown is just hours away!

angles.name: Sunday plans
angles.copy: It's World Cup Final weekend! Get ready for a massive Sunday of football as the two best teams battle it out for the trophy.

moments.title: The Open Championship Final Day
moments.blurb: The world's best golfers are battling it out at Royal Birkdale for the final day of The Open Championship, concluding today, July 18.

angles.name: Claret Jug chase
angles.copy: It's the final day of The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale! Who will lift the Claret Jug by the end of play today?

angles.name: Thrilling conclusion
angles.copy: Golf fans, get ready for a thrilling conclusion to The Open 2026. Every shot counts as the leaders chase glory.

moments.title: Happy Birthday M.I.A.
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, and songwriter M.I.A. (Mathangi Arulpragasam) celebrates her 49th birthday today, July 18.

angles.name: Paper Planes
angles.copy: Big birthday shout out to the incredible M.I.A. today! The 'Paper Planes' hitmaker turns 49. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Energy vibes
angles.copy: Celebrating M.I.A.'s 49th birthday today! From 'Galang' to 'Bad Girls', her music always brings the energy.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 19.

angles.name: Rock royalty
angles.copy: Tomorrow, rock royalty Brian May turns 79! Send your birthday wishes to the Queen legend and tell us your favourite solo.

angles.name: Iconic guitarist
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday for tomorrow to the one and only Brian May! The iconic Queen guitarist is still rocking.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Iconic guitarist Carlos Santana will celebrate his 79th birthday on Monday, July 20.

angles.name: Guitar legend
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a true guitar legend! Carlos Santana turns 79 on Monday. What's your go-to Santana track?

angles.name: Unmistakable sound
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the incredible Carlos Santana for Monday! His sound is unmistakable.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Cat Stevens
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, will turn 78 on Tuesday, July 21.

angles.name: Timeless songs
angles.copy: Happy 78th birthday wishes for Tuesday to the legendary Cat Stevens! Which of his timeless songs is your favourite?

angles.name: Voice of a generation
angles.copy: Celebrating the wonderful music of Cat Stevens, who turns 78 this Tuesday. His voice defined a generation.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder, drummer, and vocalist Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22.

angles.name: Unforgettable songs
angles.copy: Wednesday is a big day for Don Henley, who turns 79! The Eagles legend has given us so many unforgettable songs.

angles.name: Eagles vocals
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Don Henley this Wednesday! What's your favourite Eagles track featuring his vocals?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Donny Osmond
moments.blurb: Pop icon Donny Osmond will celebrate his 69th birthday on Wednesday, July 22.

angles.name: Puppy Love
angles.copy: Happy 69th birthday for Wednesday to the one and only Donny Osmond! Still got that 'Puppy Love' for him?

angles.name: Career era
angles.copy: Donny Osmond turns 69 this Wednesday! From teen idol to Broadway star, what's your favourite era of his career?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses guitar hero Slash (Saul Hudson) will celebrate his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23.

angles.name: Iconic riff
angles.copy: Get ready to shred! Slash turns 61 this Thursday. What's the most iconic Guns N' Roses riff you can think of?

angles.name: Rock 'n' roll legend
angles.copy: Wishing a rock 'n' roll happy 61st birthday to Slash on Thursday! The top hat and guitar legend is still going strong.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Michelle Williams
moments.blurb: Destiny's Child member Michelle Williams will celebrate her 46th birthday on Thursday, July 23.

angles.name: DC hit
angles.copy: Happy 46th birthday wishes for Thursday to Michelle Williams of Destiny's Child! What's your favourite DC hit?

angles.name: True talent
angles.copy: Celebrating Michelle Williams' 46th birthday this Thursday! From Destiny's Child to solo success, she's a true talent.

moments.title: Happy Birthday J.Lo
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez will celebrate her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24.

angles.name: J.Lo anthem
angles.copy: Get ready to party for J.Lo's birthday this Friday! Jennifer Lopez turns 57. What's your ultimate J.Lo anthem?

angles.name: Jenny From The Block
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 57th birthday to the one and only Jennifer Lopez on Friday! Still 'Jenny From The Block' at heart.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Annie Lennox
moments.blurb: Eurythmics icon Annie Lennox will celebrate her 72nd birthday on Saturday, July 25.

angles.name: Unforgettable voice
angles.copy: Happy 72nd birthday for Saturday to the incredible Annie Lennox! Her voice is simply unforgettable. What's your favourite Eurythmics track?

angles.name: Musical pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating Annie Lennox's 72nd birthday this Saturday! A true musical pioneer and style icon.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 24-27, 2026, bringing a weekend of music, arts, and culture.

angles.name: Festival countdown
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just around the corner! Kicking off next Thursday in Suffolk, who's heading to Henham Park?

angles.name: Music & arts weekend
angles.copy: Get ready for a massive weekend of music and arts as Latitude Festival returns from July 24-27. What act are you hoping to see?

moments.title: Summer Holiday Vibes
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are in full swing or just beginning across the UK, bringing longer days and family fun.

angles.name: School's out
angles.copy: School's out for summer! If you're officially on summer holidays, what are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Enjoy the freedom
angles.copy: The summer holidays are here! Whether you're staying local or heading away, enjoy the freedom and sunshine.

moments.title: Official Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The UK's Official Singles Chart Top 40 is updated today, July 18, revealing the biggest songs in the country.

angles.name: Number 1 reveal
angles.copy: The Official Singles Chart has just been updated! Who's at Number 1 this week? Tune in to find out the biggest hits.

angles.name: Your chart bet
angles.copy: What's your bet for the UK's Official Singles Chart Number 1 this week? The new chart is out today!
